BLACK SEA.
UKRAINE.
1. PIPELAYING OPERATIONS IN PROGRESS UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE
   BY BARGE GMC PRIDE ALONG TRACKLINES BETWEEN:
   A. 45-42.3N 031-52.4E AND 45-41.0N 031-49.0E.
   B. 45-38.6N 031-41.8E AND 45-22.2N 030-55.5E.
   C. 45-41.0N 031-49.0E AND 45-38.5N 031-40.7E.
   ONE MILE BERTH REQUESTED.
2. CANCEL HYDROLANT 2294/12.
